headline: Assessing MP Materials (MP) Valuation After 10X Texas Magnet Facility And Government Backing
summary: MP Materials (MP) has drawn fresh attention after confirming plans for its 10X rare earth magnet facility in Northlake, Texas, supported by U.S. government backing and long-term offtake agreements with General Motors and Apple. See our latest analysis for MP Materials. The share price has cooled recently, with a 1 day share price return of a 4.7% decline and a 30 day share price return of a 5.6% decline. This comes even as the 1 year total shareholder return of 113.2% and 3 year total...

headline: Assessing Himax Technologies (HIMX) Valuation After AI Data Center And Smart Glasses Supplier Speculation
summary: Himax Technologies (HIMX) is back in the spotlight after reports linked it to Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company’s co packaged optics for Nvidia AI data centers, as well as possible Apple smart glasses exposure and recent Embedded World 2026 product showcases. See our latest analysis for Himax Technologies.
